search.startTyping: Start typing to search artists, art movements, and articles.

footer.tagline: A 1,000+ member community for AI artists and art enthusiasts.
footer.discordAriaLabel: Join our Discord (opens in new tab)
footer.deviantartAriaLabel: StyleGuideAI on DeviantArt (opens in new tab)

home.metaDescription: A 1,000+ member community for AI artists. Explore our prompt generators, Virtual Museum of art history, and daily art inspiration.
home.heroSubtitle: Explore a living community of AI artists, generate stunning prompts with StyleBear, and tour 40,000 years of art history in our Virtual Museum.
home.featuresSubheading: Everything you need to create, explore, and get inspired — from prompt generators to a full museum of art history.
home.museumFeatureDesc: A scrollable timeline of 100+ art movements and 500+ artists — from Renaissance to generative AI. Click through to immersive gallery experiences.
home.stylebearFeatureDesc: Our flagship AI art prompt generator. Pick art movements, media, styles, and let StyleBear craft the perfect prompt for Flux, Midjourney, SDXL, and more.
home.styletarotFeatureDesc: A video-poker-style art inspiration game. Get dealt five artist and movement cards, hold your favorites, draw new ones, then generate your art prompt.
home.articlesFeatureDesc: 233 deep-dives into art history, movements, and techniques by Satori Canton. From Impressionism to AI art — fuel your creative research.
home.communityDesc: Every day our members share their AI art creations — from Impressionist landscapes to Cubist portraits to entirely new aesthetics. Join 1,000+ artists exploring the intersection of AI and art history.
home.consultingDesc: Founded by an AI art director with 300+ published articles on art history and AI. Available for consulting on AI art production, model training, and agentic system design.
home.consultingService1Desc: LoRA fine-tuning for custom art styles and character models.
home.consultingService2Desc: Strategic creative direction for AI-generated visual content.
home.consultingService3Desc: Custom agentic AI systems for creative workflows and automation.

about.title: About StyleGuideAI
about.intro: StyleGuideAI is a growing community of AI artists, art history enthusiasts, and creative technologists exploring the intersection of generative AI and the rich history of human art.
about.communityDesc1: What started as a small Discord server has grown into a 1,000+ member community with members from around the world. We share AI art, run daily themed art challenges, publish research on AI art styles, and build tools together.
about.communityDesc2: Our daily art themes bring the community together — every day a new movement, artist, or style to explore through AI generation. The archive lives here on StyleGuideAI.com.
about.satorRole: Head of AI at HeartStamp · Founder, StyleGuideAI
about.satorDesc1: Satori Canton is a generative AI specialist with deep expertise in AI art production, model training, and agentic system design. As Head of AI at HeartStamp, he leads AI strategy and implementation across creative products.
about.satorDesc2: He has written 300+ articles on art movements and AI art techniques on Medium, making art history accessible to AI artists everywhere. StyleGuideAI.com is the community home for that body of work.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.overviewP1: StyleGuideAI ("we," "our," or "the site") is operated by Satori Canton. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect information when you visit StyleGuideAI.com and use our tools and features.
privacy.overviewP2: We keep data collection minimal. We do not sell your personal data. We do not run advertising.
privacy.collectAccountDesc: If you choose to sign in with Google, we receive your name, email address, and profile picture from Google. This information is stored in our database and used only to power account features such as saving your StyleBear prompt history. Sign-in is never required to use any feature on the site.
privacy.collectContactDesc: When you use the contact form on the Consulting page, we collect your name, email address, optional subject, and message text. This information is sent by email to Satori Canton and is used solely to respond to your inquiry. We do not store contact form submissions in our database.
privacy.collectUsageDesc: We may collect basic, anonymized analytics about site usage (pages visited, browser type, approximate location by country). This is used to understand how the site is being used and to improve it. We do not use tracking pixels or third-party advertising trackers.
privacy.usePoint1: To provide and improve our tools and features
privacy.usePoint2: To save your StyleBear prompt history (authenticated users only)
privacy.usePoint3: To respond to consulting inquiries submitted via the contact form
privacy.usePoint4: To understand aggregate site usage patterns
privacy.useNote: We do not use your information for advertising, profiling, or sale to third parties.
privacy.cookiesDesc: We use a session cookie to maintain your sign-in state if you choose to authenticate with Google. This cookie is essential for the sign-in feature to work and is not used for tracking. We do not use advertising or third-party tracking cookies.
privacy.rightsDesc1: You may request deletion of your account and associated data at any time by emailing
privacy.rightsDesc2: . We will delete your account and any personally identifiable information within 30 days.
privacy.rightsGdpr: If you are in the European Economic Area (EEA), you have rights under the GDPR including the right to access, correct, and delete your data. Contact us at the email above to exercise these rights.
privacy.contactDesc: Questions about this Privacy Policy? Email

stylebear.metaDescription: Generate rich AI art prompts using art movements, media types, and cultural influences. StyleBear by StyleGuideAI.
stylebear.title: StyleBear
stylebear.subtitle: AI art prompt generator. Pick your movements, media, and style — StyleBear does the rest.
stylebear.subject: Subject
stylebear.subjectPlaceholder: Describe your subject. Use '{curly}' for random choices.
stylebear.footerPlaceholder: Text appended at the end of every prompt.
stylebear.error: Error generating prompt. Please try again.

styledice.metaDescription: Roll six creative dice — art movements, famous artists, media types, techniques, pop culture, and genres — then generate a ready-to-use AI art prompt.
styledice.heading: StyleDice
styledice.subtitle: Roll six dice — each one draws from a different creative category. Hold the results you like, re-roll the rest up to twice. Lock in your combination and generate a ready-to-use AI art prompt.
styledice.holdInstruction: Click a die to hold it, then Re-Roll the rest.
styledice.generateInstruction: Generate a Flux art prompt from these six elements.
styledice.error: Failed to generate prompt. Please try again.

styletarot.metaDescription: Draw five StyleTarot cards — movements, artists, media, subjects, and inspirations — and generate a detailed AI art prompt from your hand.
styletarot.title: StyleTarot
styletarot.subtitle: Deal five cards from 332 creative prompts — movements, artists, media, subjects, and more. Hold the ones you love, redraw the rest, and generate a unique AI art prompt.
styletarot.drawDescription: Deal five cards at random. Hold the ones that inspire you, then redraw the rest — once. Lock in your hand and generate your art prompt.
styletarot.holdInstruction: Click a card to hold it, then Redraw the rest.
styletarot.generateInstruction: Generate your art prompt from these five cards.
styletarot.selectCards: Select exactly {n} cards to generate a prompt.

rising.metaDescription: Community art gallery — the most-loved images from the past 24 hours, pulled from DeviantArt, Discord, and direct uploads.
rising.heading: Rising
rising.subtitle: The most-loved art from our community in the past 24 hours. Images rise by getting the most hearts in the least time — then expire to make room for what's next.
rising.uploadSubtitle: Upload your rendered image to the community gallery
rising.dropzone: Drop, click, or paste an image
rising.dropzoneFormats: JPEG, PNG, WebP, GIF — any size
rising.captionPlaceholder: The prompt you used to generate this image…
rising.signInRequired: You need to be signed in to share to Rising.
rising.liveHeading: Your image is live on Rising!
rising.liveDesc: It will be visible for 30 days and can earn likes from the community.
rising.errorFileType: Please upload an image file (JPEG, PNG, WebP, or GIF).
rising.errorProcessing: Could not process this image. Please try a different file.
rising.signInFree: Free with your Google account — takes 10 seconds.
rising.signInBenefit1: Upload your AI renders to the Rising community gallery
rising.signInBenefit2: Prompt history saved automatically (StyleBear, StyleTarot, StyleDice & Museum)
rising.signInBenefit3: Site preferences synced across devices (preferred aspect ratio, etc.)
rising.signInBenefit4: Like and engage with the community's art in Rising
rising.signInAfterNote: Your current prompt will be saved — you'll be taken right back to share it after signing in.

articles.metaDescription: Deep-dives into art movements, techniques, and the history behind the styles that inspire our AI art community. Originally published on Medium.
articles.heading: Art History Articles
articles.totalCount: {total} deep-dives into art movements, techniques, and the history behind the styles that inspire our community. Originally published on Medium.
articles.emptyState: No articles yet — check back soon!
articles.resultsCountQuery: {total, plural, one {# article} other {# articles}} matching "{query}"

themes.metaDescription: Browse all StyleGuideAI community art themes, challenges, and special events. Click through to join the conversation on Discord.
themes.heading: Themes & Events
themes.description: Every daily theme, art challenge, and community event from our Discord — all in one searchable archive. Click any card to join the conversation.
themes.emptyState: No themes yet — check back soon!

museum.metaDescription: Travel through 40,000 years of art history on an interactive timeline — movements, masters, world events, and the connections between them.
museum.heading: The Virtual Museum
museum.description: From the painted caves to the digital frontier — {movements} movements, {artists} artists, and the world events and friendships that connect them. Tap anything to step closer.
museum.enterGalleryArtworkNote: Artworks for this gallery are still being collected
museum.contentInEnglish: Museum content is currently available in English only.
museum.timelineAriaLabel: Art history timeline — scroll horizontally to travel through time
museum.timelineHint: Scroll, swipe, or jump by era — 40,000 years of art. Hover or tap a movement to trace its lineage; tap an artist to see who shaped them. Gold diamonds mark world events that bent the course of art.

account.signInDesc: Save your generated prompts, vote on Rising, and sync your preferences.
account.displayNameHint: This name appears on your Rising posts and throughout the community.
account.preferredRatioHint: When set, your generated prompts will automatically include this aspect ratio.
account.preferredLanguageHint: When set, this language is used when no browser preference is detected. Your browser's language always takes priority.
account.signInRequiredProfile: Please sign in to view your profile.

consulting.metaDescription: Satori Canton offers consulting on AI model training, art direction, and AI agent design. Head of AI at HeartStamp, founder of StyleGuideAI.
consulting.heading: AI & Art Consulting
consulting.intro: Head of AI at HeartStamp. Founder of StyleGuideAI. Author of 300+ articles on art history and AI art. I help teams build AI-powered creative systems that actually work.
consulting.contactIntro: Tell me about your project. I'll reply within a couple of days.
consulting.servicesSubheading: Three core practice areas, each grounded in both technical depth and creative expertise.
consulting.service1Desc: LoRA fine-tuning for custom image generation models — whether you want to replicate a consistent visual style, train a character or product model, or build proprietary image generation capability. I handle dataset preparation, training pipeline setup, and quality evaluation.
consulting.service2Desc: Deep knowledge of art history applied to GenAI art projects. I bridge the gap between "make it look painterly" and knowing exactly which movement, palette, and technique achieves the desired aesthetic.
consulting.service2Point3: Aesthetic direction for AI art pipelines
consulting.service3Desc: Designing and building AI-powered systems that produce generative AI outputs — end-to-end agentic workflows, multi-step prompt pipelines, tool-calling systems, and LLM integrations.
consulting.contactError: Something went wrong. Please try again or email satoricanton@gmail.com directly.
consulting.contactSuccessDesc: I typically reply within a couple of business days.

signIn.privacyNote: By signing in you agree to our privacy policy. Sign-in is optional — all tools work without an account.
